use_cases: Showcasing product features in a visually organized grid format
Creating interactive dashboard sections with animated cards
Building landing page feature sections with subtle motion effects
Displaying metrics or stats in a modern bento-style layout
Organizing diverse content types in a unified monochrome aesthetic
ai_summary: A monochrome bento grid layout component featuring multiple animated cards with floating, pulsing, tilting, and drifting effects. Supports automatic light/dark theme detection and includes scroll-triggered visibility animations. The grid showcases diverse content types including metrics, charts, and feature highlights in a cohesive minimal monochrome style suitable for modern SaaS and product landing pages.
